context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verification complete. Two fixes were tested: (1) AI generator now uses persistent project store with saveFiles and updateGenerationRun - verified by testing project loading, file persistence across navigation, and continuation prompt input. (2) Workspace mobile scroll fix - verified by checking overflow-y-auto style on left panel container. All tests pass. Frontend test suite in /app/tests/e2e/ with persistent-projects.spec.ts (16 tests) and mobile-builder.spec.ts (19 tests). Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_api.py (12 tests).
